sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12908" key="a)pokopro/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποκοπρόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n12908.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">turn into excrement,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0643.tlg001:25:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.Lond.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25.41</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
